evidence: "Not my favorite Sci-fy by any measure."
"I love it when comedy can be combined with SciFy and Warehouse 13 does a pretty good job."
"better acting would go a long way to help the show, as would a more complex plot."
"the many different events that occur seem other worldly, they are mostly plausible."
"It was as though everyone was getting used to a new job and were afraid to do anything that might ruffle anyone else's feathers."
"The season waffles a little in the middle but has a strong finish."
"better acting would go a long way to help the show, as would a more complex plot."
"the director must really emphasize facial expression, as the main characters are rife with facial expressions that contribute so much to the show."
"Piper Perabo is really comfortable with her role as a spy by now and does not disappoint."
"Anna Torv is an amazing actress, often playing two slightly different roles in the same episode."
"the season is also filled with plenty of humor but not too much."
"This is a very well written comedy with the leading role played by Ashley Rickards."
"I still feel that this is a great program to watch for those of us who are older and are trying to grasp what today's younger folks are up to."
"This is a good show for old and young viewers, as the older viewers can look back at their early teen years and remember their own awkwardness on the subject of romanced."

summary: The user enjoys sci-fi and comedy genres, often appreciating shows that blend humor with engaging narratives. They show a moderate sensitivity to production quality and emotional resonance, indicating a preference for character-driven stories with relatable themes.
